channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. and Iran escalate strikes across Mideast
item.description: The United States and Iran exchanged strikes aimed at infrastructure and military targets on Saturday as their battle over the Strait of Hormuz intens...

item.title: ICE shared Medicaid data it wasn't supposed to have with Palantir
item.description: The revelations came out in a federal court case brought by Democratic states challenging ICE's access to Medicaid data to aid in deportation efforts.

item.title: The 2000s called. They want their digital camera back
item.description: Why are people who weren't born 25 years ago snapping up the digital camera of that era? Blame Taylor Swift, trend cycles, childhood nostalgia and sma...

item.title: Oops! Graceful ways to handle awkward moments
item.description: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address walking around with spinach in your teeth. Here are tactics to quickly defuse embarrassing situations.
